synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-0369 Oracle Linux 8 openscap bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0369
description:
[1.3.13-1.0.1]
- Add oracle cpe names to internal cpe dictionary [Orabug: 33493979]
- Drop OpenELA branding

[1.3.13.openela.1.0]
- Add OpenELA to openscap

[1.3.13-1]
- Rebase to the latest upstream version (RHEL-133977)
- Add note that oscap xccdf eval --local-file only works with SCAP 1.3 data streams (RHEL-74343)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-0369

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0369.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
openscap-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
openscap-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
openscap-devel-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
openscap-devel-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
openscap-engine-sce-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
openscap-engine-sce-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
openscap-engine-sce-devel-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
openscap-engine-sce-devel-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
openscap-python3-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
openscap-scanner-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
openscap-utils-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
openscap-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
openscap-devel-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
openscap-engine-sce-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
openscap-engine-sce-devel-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
openscap-python3-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
openscap-scanner-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm
openscap-utils-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/openscap-1.3.13-1.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.3.13-1.0.1]
- Add oracle cpe names to internal cpe dictionary [Orabug: 33493979]
- Drop OpenELA branding

[1.3.13.openela.1.0]
- Add OpenELA to openscap

[1.3.13-1]
- Rebase to the latest upstream version (RHEL-133977)
- Add note that oscap xccdf eval --local-file only works with SCAP 1.3 data streams (RHEL-74343)
